lounges.name: Club Aspire Lounge (Terminal 5)
lounges.notes: Operator No1 Lounges; from-price per adult, pre-booking recommended. Priority Pass accepted pre-booking only.

lounges.name: Plaza Premium Lounge (Terminal 5)
lounges.notes: Operator Plaza Premium; on-the-day 2-hour walk-in rate (~10% off if booked online). Priority Pass accepted subject to capacity.

lounges.name: Club Aspire Lounge (South Terminal)
lounges.notes: Operator No1 Lounges; from-price per adult. Priority Pass accepted pre-booking only.

lounges.name: No1 Lounge (North Terminal)
lounges.notes: Operator No1 Lounges; from-price per adult.

lounges.name: Escape Lounge (Terminal 2)
lounges.notes: Operator Escape Lounges; from-price per adult. Priority Pass accepted (prioritypass.com directory).

lounges.name: Escape Lounge (Terminal 3)
lounges.notes: Operator Escape Lounges; from-price per adult.

lounges.name: Essence by Escape Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator Escape Lounges; pre-book from-price per adult (walk-up ~£35). Priority Pass accepted (prioritypass.com directory).

lounges.name: MyLounge
lounges.notes: Replaced the former Aspire Lounge (2024). From-price per adult; walk-in on the day subject to availability. Priority Pass / LoungeKey / DragonPass accepted.

lounges.name: Escape Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator Escape Lounges; from-price per adult. Priority Pass accepted (prioritypass.com directory).

lounges.name: Aspire Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator Aspire; official one-day admission from-price per adult. Priority Pass / Dragonpass accepted (prioritypass.com directory).

lounges.name: No1 Lounge
lounges.notes: Premium lounge listed on Birmingham Airport official lounges page; walk-in price set dynamically and not statically published.

lounges.name: UpperDeck Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator Aspire; from-price per adult per Glasgow Airport official page. Priority Pass accepted (prioritypass.com directory).

lounges.name: Escape Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator Escape Lounges; from-price per adult. Priority Pass accepted (prioritypass.com directory).

lounges.name: Essence by Escape Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator Escape Lounges; from-price per adult.

lounges.name: Aspire Lounge
lounges.notes: Operator No1 Lounges / Aspire; from-price per adult (dynamic by date). Priority Pass / Dragonpass / Dreamfolks accepted, pre-booking required.
